title: WarBorn Capture Points
description: Forge 1.20.1 capture-points mode with round timer, contest pause, centered compact HUD with team icons, and full admin config/commands.
body:
## WarBorn Capture Points

### Advanced Team-Based Zone Control System for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1

**Transform your Minecraft server into an intense strategic battlefield with customizable capture zones! This comprehensive mod brings competitive team-based gameplay to multiplayer servers with advanced capture mechanics, multiple game modes, and extensive configuration options.**

License and usage notice
- License: All Rights Reserved. Server use is prohibited without the Author’s prior written permission. See LICENSE for full terms.
- RU: Лицензия: Все права защищены. Серверное использование запрещено без письменного разрешения автора. См. LICENSE.



Admin commands (/cp)
Permission: requires permission level 3 (ops).
- /cp start — Enable the capture system on the current server/world.
- /cp stop — Disable the capture system.
- /cp pos1 — Set your first corner (current position) for the next zone.
- /cp pos2 — Set your second corner (current position) for the next zone.
- /cp zone add <id> — Create a zone with the selected corners under the given id in the current dimension.
- /cp zone remove <id> — Remove a zone by id in the current dimension.
- /cp zone setowner <id> <team> — Force-set the owner team for a zone (resets capture state).
- /cp zone settime <id> <seconds> — Override capture time for that zone (1–600s).
- /cp zone list — List zones in the current dimension with bounds and owner info.
- /cp mode [FREE|CHAIN_AB|LINEAR|ALTERNATING] — Set the capture gating mode at runtime.
